title: Realistic Campfires
body:
This plugin adds the new logic for the campfire. The logic based on the fuel (you can configure this moment in the file configuration) that can burn. In this case, plugin adds the indication for the campfire as hologram, it provides easy mechanic interaction.

![The campfire that does not burning with the indication](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b43ec85c61a343596833774383e2d62cca2f248.png)

![The campfire that burning with the indication](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/408329d27d70854a81c6012f44a3e117551802fb.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/izMrPyZFtw8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Instalation guide
1. Download [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)
2. Download Realistic Campfires
3. Put all downloaded files to plugins folder
